<!--
One topic per PR. If the diff outgrows this description, split it.
Read CONTRIBUTING.md for style + commit conventions.
-->

## Summary

What changed and why. Skip the "what" if the diff makes it obvious — lead
with the "why".

## Test plan

- [ ] `go build ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `golangci-lint run`
- [ ] Manual repro (paste the command + a snippet of relevant output)

## Notes for reviewer

Anything non-obvious: trade-offs you considered, follow-ups you'd prefer to
defer, files that look unrelated but are.
